/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/testing.dir/test/test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/areaDamageSpell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/cell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/directDamageSpell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/enemyTower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/gameManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/hand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testing.dir/src/trapSpell.cpp.o -o testing  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
